name: delete_drc_ruledeck
short_description: Delete one or more user defined DRC rule deck objects
full_help:
delete_drc_ruledeck

Description: 
Delete one or more user defined DRC rule deck objects

Syntax: 
delete_drc_ruledeck  [-regexp] [-nocase] [-filter <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]
                     [<patterns>]

Returns: 
drc_ruledeck

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-regexp]     Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]     Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp 
                specified)
  [-filter]     Filter list with expression
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]  Match the 'drc_ruledeck' objects against patterns.
                Default: *

Categories: 
DRC, Object

arguments.description: Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp specified)
Suspend message limits during command execution
